name: humify
description: Codex-oriented framework for evidence-backed codebase audits and tests-first refactor planning.

interface.shortDescription: Audit messy codebases and plan safe refactors.
interface.longDescription: Humify helps Codex map repositories, exclude generated output, identify machine-shaped maintainability signals without unsupported origin claims, produce evidence-backed audit artifacts, and plan tests-first refactor slices.
defaultPrompt: Use Humify to create a refactor plan.
